## SANKEY chart, EVIDENTIA style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-FLO-02",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "flow",
    "composition",
    "variance-decomposition"
  ],
  "form": "column-stacked nodes joined by width-true bands",
  "data_required": "2-3 node columns + links between adjacent columns; conserved totals",
  "family": "FLO",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-FLO-01 (one total changing through steps)",
    "CH-PTW-01 (composition without flow)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "one quantity bridges start to end",
      "use": "CH-FLO-01"
    },
    {
      "when": "no movement between states",
      "use": "CH-PTW-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- where things came from and where they went, conserved end to end
- sources to routes to destinations in one figure

Do NOT use when:
- cyclic flows (sankeys are acyclic by construction)
- more than ~6 nodes per column

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first node label",
  "columns": "[{name, nodes: [{name, value}]}] 2-3 columns",
  "links": "[{from, to, value}] adjacent columns only"
}
```

### Rules
- band width IS the value, at both ends; totals conserve per node
- nodes stacked deterministically in input order, centered per column
- links drawn in input order: order is part of the spec

### Never do this
- links whose widths change between ends
- crossing minimization by randomization
- cycles
- more than 3 columns

### QA before delivering
- [ ] per-node conservation
- [ ] adjacent-column links only
- [ ] input order preserved
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| node | `#0B1F35` |
| link | `#2251FF` |
| label | `#3C4A5A` |
| title | `#0B1F35` |
| source | `#3C4A5A` |

### Fonts

- Title font: Georgia,serif, weight 700
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

Draw the kicker bar and CAPS eyebrow defined in the layout, and use title y_with_eyebrow.
